_comment: Declares the pipeline modes and which agents run at each stage. Modified by the workflow-configurator when users add/remove specialists or toggle industry modules.

express.description: Fast-track for simple documents (short NDAs, standard POs, order forms). Skips the full specialist fan-out.

standard.description: Default pipeline for most B2B contracts. Core specialist fan-out plus critical-issues sweep.

comprehensive.description: Deep analysis for high-value, regulated, or complex contracts. Adds compliance-regulatory analyst and any enabled industry modules.

technology_saas.description: SaaS-specific concerns: uptime SLA, data processing, subprocessors, API terms, usage-based pricing.

construction.description: Construction-specific: site conditions, lien rights, change orders, differing site conditions, weather delay. NOT INCLUDED by default — scaffold via workflow-configurator if needed.

maritime.description: Marine/vessel-specific: admiralty jurisdiction, Jones Act, general average, salvage. NOT INCLUDED by default — scaffold via workflow-configurator if needed.

healthcare.description: Healthcare: HIPAA, Stark, Anti-Kickback, CMS regs. NOT INCLUDED by default — scaffold via workflow-configurator if needed.
